content.full_text:
January 15, 1991

Ms. Sandra Taylor, Consultant 1
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street
Sacramento, CA 95814

Re: Committee For Government
    Preparation and Filing of Form 420
    for Qualification of a Ballot Measure

Dear Ms. Taylor:

This letter is to confirm our telephone conversation today in regards to the above referenced matter. As per your instruction, the Committee for Government in preparation of Form 420, Campaign Disclosure Statement, will provide disclosure of only those expenses which directly relate to the qualification of the ballot measure. Also, included in our statement will be any money received from private citizen donations.

Thank you once again for your time and should you need to speak with anyone at the Committee for Government, please do not hesitate to contact our office at the above number.

Very truly yours,

Craig Jones
